verifiedSurfaces: Cockpit served in Dev live mode with MSW disabled
Unauthorized live API session state surfaced
Runs view remained in Waiting for data state because the live API was unavailable
notVerified: Evidence Log redaction spot check through Cockpit

preflightResults.summary: Compose project validation failed because the cockpit API service depends on otel-collector while the dev:all script does not enable the tools profile.

preflightResults.command: docker compose --profile baseline --profile runtime --profile auth --profile idp --profile authz --profile erp --profile tools --profile cockpit -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml up --wait
preflightResults.summary: Docker Desktop Linux engine pipe was unavailable, so the production-like compose stack could not start.
Required live-stack smoke stopped because http://localhost:8080/healthz was unavailable.

consoleAndNetworkEvidence.summary: The headed browser capture recorded fetch failures for /auth/session, /auth/dev-session, /v1/workspaces, approvals, runs, and events. Local live API calls were blocked by the current Cockpit CSP before data could load.

releaseClaim.summary: This is headed live-browser limitation evidence, not successful production-like operator-flow evidence. The deterministic rehearsal remains confirmed, but this release-candidate attempt does not promote the browser evidence gate.
